description: Comprehensive PS5 homebrew dashboard with WebUI - System monitor, file manager, package installer, and payload manager (Port 7007)

changelog: ⚠ This is a beta version. Use with caution.
Dual-pane File Commander for direct file manipulation
Network-based Package Manager for remote .pkg installations
Payload Manager for automated .elf or .bin file injection
Sentinel Warden: Intelligent background monitor for automatic kstuff toggling
Requires kstuff - send kstuff.elf before VoidShell or place in /data directory
Install VoidShell_local.pkg for PS5-local web interface access
⚠ For testing purposes and providing feedback only.
Run repair tool inside webserver if icons are broken
